description: As the IT Asset Manager for MedTech Corporation, you must execute an organizational spin-off of the 'Consumer Wearables' division into an independent startup named 'Aura Health'. Create the new company 'Aura Health' and update the 'Consumer Wearables' department, all users assigned to that department, and all hardware assets checked out to those users to reflect the new company. Additionally, locate all unassigned assets with 'Wearable' in their name and update their company to 'Aura Health'. Do not modify the company assignment of any users, departments, or assets belonging to the parent company, nor any unassigned assets that do not contain 'Wearable' in the name.
